name: Budget-Conscious Millennial
description: A young professional in the GTA juggling rent and student debt. Shops online frequently, loves discount codes, and will switch brands for a 10% savings. Prefers fast delivery over premium packaging.

name: Eco-Conscious Gen X
description: A BC-based professional who prioritizes environmental impact over price. Pays a premium for certified organic and locally sourced products. Loyal to brands that demonstrate genuine sustainability commitments.

name: Rural Deal-Seeker
description: Lives outside a major centre and drives 45 minutes to the nearest Walmart. Buys in bulk, avoids impulse purchases, and plans shopping trips carefully. Very price-sensitive; inflation has real impact on household budget.
